headline: Consumer Stocks Have Fallen Behind. These Retail Names Still Stand Out.
summary: UBS says the best consumer stocks share a handful of traits, including strong growth, solid returns, and an ability to exceed expectations. Viking Holdings, TJX, and Amazon are among its favorites.

headline: Ulta Beauty Lifts FY26 View as Q1 Earnings Beat, Comps Rise 5.3%
summary: Ulta Beauty beats on Q1 FY26 earnings and sales as comps rise 5.3%, helped by Space NK, leading the retailer to raise its full-year view.

headline: THE 27TH ANNUAL BEST BUDDIES CHALLENGE: HYANNIS PORT PRESENTED BY JERSEY MIKE'S SUBS, SHAW'S AND STAR MARKET FOUNDATION AND THE TJX COMPANIES, INC. RAISES MORE THAN $4 MILLION TO SUPPORT PEOPLE WITH INTELLECTUAL AND DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES
summary: This year, nearly 1,000 people participated in the 27th Annual Best Buddies Challenge: Hyannis Port, presented by Jersey Mike's Subs, Shaw's and Star Market Foundation and The TJX Companies, Inc. More, a cycling, run and walk fundraiser from Boston to Hyannis Port, May 29-30.
